name: Astrid—The Rogue Prince(ess)
description:
Come join the festivities! Fresh fruits, lively music, dancing, and a spread full of laughter... and oh—what’s this? A stowaway princess hidden in plain sight?

Well, hey. HAPPY SOLMIRA FEST! 🎉🍐

She is one of my sonas. Decided to bring her out. Yay! 🤣
creator: JustHaru
